title: Utilising DHE SDA, PTBA to work with 3 state-owned banks
body: PT Bukit Asam Tbk (PTBA) has signed a Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) for utilisation of Forex Export Proceeds from Nature-Resourced Export Goods (DHE SDA) with 3 state-owned banks.

title: SUN auction reported bids of IDR 46.65 trillion this time
body: Total incoming bids reported in the latest auction of Government Securities (lit. Surat Utang Negara/SUN) yesterday (1/10) reached IDR 46.65 trillion.

title: NICE secures IDR 15.83 billion loan from LX International Corp
body: PT Adhi Kartiko Pratama Tbk (NICE) has received a loan of USD 1 million, equal to IDR 15.83 billion, from LX International Corp (LXI), its affiliate.

title: Two new companies queuing for IPO, price starts at IDR 128 per share
body: PT Verona Indah Pictures Tbk (VERN) and PT Master Print Tbk (PTMR) is currently conducting public offering process of its shares from today (2/10) until October 4, 2024.

title: Masterprint to acquire consumable product distributor
body: PT Master Print Tbk (PTMR) is said to acquire 99% of PT Global Putra Kusuma (GKP), a distributor of consumables and machine for Small and Medium Enterprises (SME).

title: Utilising DHE SDA, PTBA to work with 3 state-owned banks
body: PT Bukit Asam Tbk (PTBA) has signed a Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) for utilisation of Forex Export Proceeds from Nature-Resourced Export Goods (DHE SDA) with 3 state-owned banks.

title: SUN auction reported bids of IDR 46.65 trillion this time
body: Total incoming bids reported in the latest auction of Government Securities (lit. Surat Utang Negara/SUN) yesterday (1/10) reached IDR 46.65 trillion.

title: NICE secures IDR 15.83 billion loan from LX International Corp
body: PT Adhi Kartiko Pratama Tbk (NICE) has received a loan of USD 1 million, equal to IDR 15.83 billion, from LX International Corp (LXI), its affiliate.

title: Two new companies queuing for IPO, price starts at IDR 128 per share
body: PT Verona Indah Pictures Tbk (VERN) and PT Master Print Tbk (PTMR) is currently conducting public offering process of its shares from today (2/10) until October 4, 2024.

title: Masterprint to acquire consumable product distributor
body: PT Master Print Tbk (PTMR) is said to acquire 99% of PT Global Putra Kusuma (GKP), a distributor of consumables and machine for Small and Medium Enterprises (SME).

title: JCI gains strides throughout the day
body: Jakarta Stock Price Composite Index (JCI) soared throughout today’s (1/10) session although has yet to fully rebound to 7,500-ish.

title: Prima Globalindo Logistik to distribute interim dividend of IDR 2 per share
body: PT Prima Globalindo Logistik Tbk (PPGL), a logistics and delivery company, announces the plan of interim dividend distribution of IDR 1.54 billion or IDR 2 per share.

title: BUMA’s bonds reported 1.4 oversubscription
body: PT Bukit Makmur Mandiri Utama (BUMA), a subsidiary of PT Delta Dunia Makmur Tbk (DOID), reported oversubscription for Bond II Year 2024.

title: SMMA to invest IDR 95 billion in Liugong Finance Indonesia
body: PT Sinar Mas Multiartha Tbk (SMMA), a financial service company under Sinar Mas Group, has made capital investment in PT Liugong Finance Indonesia.

title: PTRO to invest IDR 6 trillion on mining equipment in Central Kalimantan
body: PT Petrosea Tbk (PTRO) spent IDR 6 trillion of its capital expenditure (capex) budget in order to acquire new supporting equipment to support business expansion in Central Kalimantan.

title: Accelerating green hydrogen innovation, PGEO to work with Pertamina NRE and Genvia
body: PT Pertamina Geothermal Energi Tbk (PGEO) has signed a Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) with PT Pertamina Power Indonesia (Pertamina NRE) and Genevia, a France-based company focusing on clean hydrogen technology development.

title: Not out of the woods yet, GIAA lost USD 101.65 million in H1 2024
body: The loss of PT Garuda Indonesia (Persero) Tbk (GIIA) worsened 32.88% year-on-year (yoy) in the first half (H1) of 2024 to USD 101.65 million from USD 76.50 million seen in H1 2023.

title: Indika Energy to divest subsidiary to Barito Group
body: PT Indika Energy Tbk (INDY) has divested its portion in one of its subsidiaries, PT Trisetia Citagraha (TCG), and transferred it to PT Barito Pacific Lumber (BPL).

title: Lowering debt, Jasa Marga to divest shares in Trans Jawa Toll Road
body: PT Jasa Marga (Persero) Tbk (JSMR) has divested its shares in PT Jasamarga Transjawa Tol (JTT) to 3 new investors for deleveraging purposes.

title: Bank Panin to extend its IDR 3.91 trillion bond offering period
body: PT Bank Pan Indonesia Tbk (PNBN) modifies the schedule of the issuance of Shelf-Registration Bond IV Phase II Year 2024 with total principal worth IDR 3.91 trllion.

title: Gov’t raises fund again, eyeing IDR 22 trillion in SUN auction
body: The Indonesian government will once again hold another auction of Government Securities (SUN) yesterday (1/10), with an indicative target of IDR 22 trillion.

title: RUNS to distribute bonus shares to directors and commissioners
body: PT Global Sukses Solusi Tbk (RUNS) has transferred treasury stock gained from buyback as bonus shares to the boards of directors, commissioners, and employees, as well.

title: MCAS to set up buyback, preparing IDR 90.7 billion
body: PT M Cash Integrasi Tbk (MCAS) is planning a shares buyback of 30.2 million shares at most, or equal to 3.48% of its issued and paid-up capital.

title: BJTM to inject IDR 10 billion in Bank Banten
body: Shareholders of PT BPD Jawa Timur Tbk (BJTM) agreed upon extra capital investment channelled to PT BPD Banten Tbk (BEKS) worth IDR 10 billion.

title: Opening the week, JCI sluggish throughout the morning
body: Jakarta Stock Price Composite Indes (JCI) was corrected to 7,590 until the morning session was closed at 12 PM WIB today (30/9).

title: DI wraps up acquisition of 55% KMDS for IDR 184.8 billion
body: PT Dima Investindo (DI) reportedly completed the acquisition of 55% of PT Miki Ojisan Indomitra (MOI) placed in PT Kurniamitra Duta Sentosa Tbk (KMDS) for IDR 184.8 billion last week (26/9).

title: Share purchase transactions recorded larger, net foreign volume surplus at 426.93 million shares
body: Foreign investors bought more shares on Friday, September 27, than they sold. Foreign purchasing volume was recorded at 4.53 billion shares, while foreign selling volume was 4.11 billion shares. As a result, the net foreign volume surplus at around 426.93 million shares. Foreign investors initiated share purchase transactions by buying 2.26 billion shares of the digital company PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO) and resulting in a net volume of 192.76 million shares.

title: UOB Kay Hian owns 96% of Centratama Telekomunikasi (CENT) after purchasing 18 billion shares
body: On Wednesday, September 25, PT Centratama Telekomuniks Indonesia Tbk (CENT) saw the purchase of 18.04 billion shares by foreign investor UOB Kay Hian Private Limited. This Singaporean investor's shareholding jumped from 38.3% to 96.17% as a result of the transaction through PT UOB Kay Hian Sekuritas, making them the current controlling shareholder. The CENT stock is actively involved in the development of telecommunications infrastructure.

title: TOWR scored IDR 1.60 trillion profit, up 9.4%
body: PT Sarana Menara Nusantara Tbk (TOWR) secured net profit in H1 2024 of IDR 1.60 trillion, up 9.40% year-on-year (yoy) from IDR 1.46 trillion seen in the same period last year.

title: UNTR to channel interim dividend of IDR 2.42 trillion
body: PT United Tractros Tbk (UNTR), a subsidiary of PT Astra International Tbk (ASII) engaged in the heavy equipment and mining industry, is preparing for interim dividend distribution of IDR 2.42 trillion or IDR 667 per share.

title: SMSM bags dividend income of IDR 8.06 billion
body: PT Selamat Sempurna Tbk (SMSM), an automotive spare part manufacturer, announces dividend income recorded from one of its subsidiaries in Malaysia, Bradke Synergies Sdn Bhd.

title: IDX: 30 companies line up for IPO, another 11 for rights issue
body: Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) authorities reveals that 30 issuers have entered the pipeline for Initial Public Offering (IPO), and another 11 are lining up for rights issue as of September 20, 2024.

title: BJTM rakes in IDR 620.86 billion of profit in H1 2024
body: PT BPD Jawa Timur Tbk (BJTM) scored IDR 620.86 billion of profit in the first half (H1) of 2024, 13.78% year-on-year (yoy) lower from IDR 720.14 billion seen in the same period last year.

title: BI and BNM work on potential currency swap worth IDR 82 trillion
body: Bank Indonesia (BI) and Bank Negara Malaysia (BNM) enable local currency exchange with total value amounting to a maximum of IDR 82 trillion or equal to MYR 24 billion throughout the next 5 years.

title: KRYA secures Mie Sedaap warehouse construction contract
body: PT Bangun Karya Perkasa Jaya Tbk (KRYA), a building construction company, has acquired the contract of the construction of 7 units of warehouses for Mie Sedaap raw ingredient storage.

title: RMK Investama acquires 900 million RMK Energy (RMKE) shares
body: PT RMK Investama made the decision to bolster its stake in coal logistics service provider PT RMK Energy Tbk (RMKE) on Tuesday, September 24. This investor previously owned about 25.14 percent of the shares; however, after adding 900 million shares through PT Ciptadana Sekuritas Asia, this investor now owns 45.71 percent of the shares and is the controlling shareholder. Additionally, the parent company, PT MNC Asia Holding Tbk, has acquired another 260 million shares of its subsidiary, PT MNC Land Tbk (KPIG), which develops and manages resorts and hotels, increasing its ownership to 9.68%.

title: PTPP speeds up IKN Airport completion by the end of this year
body: PT Pembangunan Perumahan (Persero) Tbk (PTPP) is targeting the Nusantara Capital City (IKN) Airport project to be completed at the end of this year.

title: Esta Indonesia to grant subsidiary extra capital of IDR 6 billion
body: PT Esta Indonesia Tbk (NEST), a swallow farm company, has provided extra capital to one of its subsidiaries, PT Tunas Esta Indonesia (TEI).

title: Entering green zone, net foreign volume closed at 456.94 million shares
body: Foreigners purchased and sold shares on Thursday, September 26, bringing net foreign volume into the green zone and closing at 456.94 million shares. The figure was calculated using the difference between foreign buying volume (4.86 billion shares) and foreign selling volume (4.41 billion shares). The digital corporation PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO) then had the largest share purchase record at 2.64 billion shares for a net volume of 816.63 million shares.

title: JCI plummeted in early morning session
body: Jakarta Composite Stock Price Index (JCI) slipped since the opening bell today (27/9) until 10.02 AM WIB.
